content.body: sideshowbarker keithamus : Sorry about the very bad time management and, therefore, slow review on my part. On the assumption that it makes sense to turn on the new `select` parsing behavior only when more associated Gecko parts are in place and on the assumption that enough more Gecko parts are likely to be in place soonish, I think it makes sense to land both your changesets in the respective repos, not bother with adding an enable/disable flag in the validator upstream, and to re-sync the code after Gecko is ready to turn the new `select` parsing on by default.
